analysis:
ISSUES FOUND:

- CRITICAL: Complete system silence - no logs from any workflow (weekly pipeline, learning loop, Alpaca trading, premarket monitor, weekend catalyst refresh) for past 7 days
- Recommended action: Investigate system status immediately - likely complete system failure or logging infrastructure down

ISSUES FOUND:

• **CRITICAL**: Health check shows "No log entries found for past 7 days" - this indicates either a logging system failure or complete system inactivity for the entire monitoring period

• **WARNING**: Only 1 workflow (alpaca_trader/monitor) active in logs - missing weekly pipeline, learning loop, premarket monitor, and weekend catalyst refresh workflows

• **WARNING**: Multiple alpaca_trader exit attempts (20:08 and 21:12) suggest potential retry behavior or incomplete exit processing

The logging gap makes it impossible to assess system health properly. Investigate logging infrastructure and verify if other workflows actually ran but failed to log.

ISSUES FOUND:

• **CRITICAL**: No weekly pipeline execution detected in past 7 days - missing core ranking/trading logic that should run weekly
• **CRITICAL**: No learning loop activity found - model performance tracking and retraining appears offline  
• **CRITICAL**: No weekend catalyst refresh detected - Sunday evening and Monday morning runs missing
• **CRITICAL**: No premarket monitoring on Monday morning - missing 5 expected premarket checks
• **WARNING**: Only exit trades executed via alpaca_trader, no entry trades detected - may indicate missing buy signals or incomplete weekly cycle
• **WARNING**: Alpaca monitor session shows no phase transitions over 10 polls - unusually quiet market activity or potential monitoring issues

Recommend immediate investigation of weekly pipeline scheduler and verification of all workflow automation.

ISSUES FOUND:

• **CRITICAL** - collect_returns: Hard failure due to dtype error on 'composite_rank' column [2026-04-17 23:44:31]. This suggests data corruption in ranking output. Investigate column types in weekly pipeline output.

• **CRITICAL** - retrain: Complete training failure - no rows passed feature/label mask across 29 weeks of data [2026-04-17 23:45:08, 2026-04-18 02:36:08]. Training pipeline is broken, model not updating.

• **WARNING** - alpaca_trader: High failure rate on entries - 9 filled but 11 failed (55% failure rate) [2026-04-20 19:41:19]. Failed symbols: ALLO, BCRX, PRDO, PRME, SFD, SNDX, CTLP, STRC, XTIA, SAFT. Investigate liquidity/availability issues.

• **WARNING** - premarket_monitor: DST configuration issues causing skips [2026-04-20 13:59:24, 2026-04-21 12:54:41]. Monitor not running during expected premarket hours.

• **INFO** - alpaca_trader: Multiple incomplete exit attempts on Wed/Thu, no completion logged for Friday exit workflow. Verify positions were properly closed.

ISSUES FOUND:

- CRITICAL: collect_returns workflow failed [2026-04-17 23:44:31] - "Column 'composite_rank' has dtype object, cannot use method 'nsmallest'" - data type corruption preventing returns collection, investigate data pipeline integrity

- WARNING: retrain workflow consistently skipping [2026-04-17 23:45:08, 2026-04-18 02:36:08] - "no training rows passed feature/label mask" across 29 weeks of data (85,346 raw rows) - model not updating, review feature/label filtering logic

- WARNING: alpaca_trader high failure rate [2026-04-20 19:41:19] - 11 out of 20 entry orders failed (55% failure rate) - significantly above normal 0-2 failed per week, investigate order execution issues

- WARNING: premarket_monitor not running [2026-04-20 13:59:24, 2026-04-21 12:54:41] - DST guard preventing execution (CT hour 8 and 7 vs expected 6) - monitor missing premarket checks, adjust scheduling for daylight saving time

ISSUES FOUND:

• **CRITICAL**: execution_tracker failed with unhandled exception on 2026-04-25 02:03:49 - "cannot access local variable 'score_row'" - likely preventing proper position tracking

• **CRITICAL**: alpaca_monitor repeatedly failed to place stops for MXL position throughout 2026-04-30 - "insufficient qty available" errors indicate position may be unprotected by stop losses

• **WARNING**: retrain skipped on 2026-04-24 23:42:29 - "no training rows passed feature/label mask" with 29 weeks of data suggests potential data quality issue

• **WARNING**: premarket_monitor consistently skipped due to DST guard (expected hour 6 CT, running at hours 7-9) - may miss critical premarket moves

• **WARNING**: in_sample_ic at 0.2531 is below normal range (0.40-0.75) indicating poor model performance

• **INFO**: Weekend refresh universe shows only 2,980 symbols vs normal 4,800-5,500 range - significantly smaller universe

ISSUES FOUND:

- **CRITICAL**: execution_tracker unhandled exception on 2026-04-25 02:03:49 - "cannot access local variable 'score_row'" preventing execution tracking completion
- **CRITICAL**: retrain skipped on 2026-04-24 23:42:29 - no training rows passed feature/label mask despite 29 weeks of data, model may be stale
- **WARNING**: premarket_monitor consistently skipped due to DST guard issues on 2026-04-27 and 2026-04-28 - expected hour 6 but running at hours 7-9
- **WARNING**: alpaca_monitor repeated MXL stop order failures (26 errors) on 2026-04-30 - insufficient quantity available, position may be unprotected
- **INFO**: model IC at 0.2531 is below normal range (0.40-0.75), indicating poor predictive performance

Actions needed: Fix execution_tracker variable scoping bug, investigate retrain feature/label mask filtering, adjust premarket_monitor DST logic, resolve MXL position/order conflict in Alpaca.

ISSUES FOUND:

- **CRITICAL**: execution_tracker: Unhandled NaN conversion error on 2026-05-02 02:51:52 - execution tracking may be incomplete, verify trade records manually

- **WARNING**: premarket_monitor: DST guard blocking all Monday premarket checks (expected hour 6 CT, getting 7-9) - monitor not running when needed for market open preparation

- **WARNING**: alpaca_monitor: Persistent poll errors across multiple sessions (74-104 total errors May 5-7) - API connectivity or data feed issues affecting position monitoring

- **INFO**: alpaca_trader: Only 6 positions closed on exit vs 10 entered - 4 positions may have been stopped out during week, verify stops executed properly

ISSUES FOUND:

- CRITICAL: execution_tracker workflow failure on 2026-05-02 02:51:52 - "cannot convert float NaN to integer" error preventing execution tracking. Investigate data integrity and fix NaN handling.

- WARNING: alpaca_monitor experiencing consistent poll_errors (10 errors per session) on 2026-05-05 and 2026-05-06, indicating potential API connectivity or data retrieval issues. Monitor resolved by 2026-05-08.

- WARNING: premarket_monitor not running at expected 6 AM CT due to DST guard triggering at hours 7, 8, and 9 on multiple days. Verify DST logic is correctly configured.

- INFO: Model IC score at 0.2755 is below normal range (0.40-0.75), indicating potential model degradation requiring review.
